## Summary

<!-- What does this change do and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` -- New feature
- [ ] `fix` -- Bug fix
- [ ] `tweak` -- Adjustment to defaults or tolerances
- [ ] `refactor` -- Code restructuring (no behavior change)
- [ ] `ui` -- Command dialog, icons, or menu changes
- [ ] `chore` -- Config, manifest, maintenance

## Engines affected

- [ ] Wall (flat faces)
- [ ] Cylinder (circumferential)
- [ ] Multi (multi-face)
- [ ] None / Infrastructure only

## Testing

<!-- How was this tested? Describe the Fusion 360 scenario. -->

- [ ] Tested in Fusion 360 on macOS / Windows
- [ ] Verified preview generates correctly
- [ ] Verified final execute produces expected geometry
